action.ptxt: Inspect shift solenoid valve “B” circuit for open, short and intermittent failure. If NG, repair shift solenoid valve “B” circuit.

ps.ptxt: Output shaft speed sensor circuit faulty

action.ptxt: Inspect output shaft speed sensor circuit for open, short and intermittent failure. If NG, repair output shaft speed sensor circuit.
Inspect transmission range sensor circuit for open, short and intermittent failure. If NG, repair transmission range sensor circuit.
Inspect CAN communication circuit for open, short and intermittent failure. If NG, repair CAN communication circuit.
Inspect throttle position sensor circuit for open, short and intermittent failure.
If NG, repair throttle position sensor circuit.
Substitute a known-good TCM and recheck.
Replace ECM with new one and recheck.
